Wellness
Confidential & Secure

Your Journey toHealing Starts Here

Access confidential psychosocial assessments, evidence-based coping strategies, and personalized support for survivors of online gender-based violence.

Start AssessmentLearn How It Works
End-to-end encrypted
100% Anonymous
Available 24/7
Simple Process

How It Works

Four simple steps to access confidential support and begin your healing journey

01

Create Your Account

Sign up anonymously with a username. No personal information required. Your identity remains completely confidential.

02

Complete Assessment

Answer questions about your experiences and current wellbeing. The assessment covers PTSD, anxiety, depression, and daily functioning.

03

Receive Your Analysis

Get immediate insights into your mental health status with personalized recommendations and coping resources.

04

Track Your Progress

Monitor your healing journey over time. Regular follow-ups help measure improvement and adjust your care plan.

Platform Features

Comprehensive Support Tools

Evidence-Based Assessment

Clinically validated screening tools for PTSD, anxiety, depression, and functional impairment.

Coping Resources

Access personalized strategies, grounding techniques, and self-care recommendations.

Progress Tracking

Visual charts and reports showing your improvement over time with trend analysis.

Multi-Role Support

Separate pathways for survivors, practitioners, and advocates with tailored content.

Legal Integration

Connect with CAT Kenya legal aid services directly through the platform.

Follow-Up Care

Regular check-ins and extended assessments to monitor long-term recovery.

Your Privacy Matters

Privacy & Security Commitment

We understand the sensitive nature of your experiences. Our platform is designed with your safety and confidentiality as the highest priority.

No personal identification required
End-to-end encryption for all data
Data stored securely on local servers
No sharing with third parties
You control your data and can delete anytime
Compliant with data protection laws

Security Badge

IRCT Accredited Platform

EncryptionAES-256
Data StorageLocal Servers
Access ControlRole-Based
ComplianceGDPR + Kenya DPA
FAQ

Common Questions

Yes. You only need to create a username - no email, phone number, or personal information is required. Your identity remains completely confidential.

Only you and authorized CAT Kenya practitioners can view your results. Practitioners only see aggregated data for research and service improvement purposes.

The platform includes evidence-based screenings for PTSD, anxiety, depression, functional impairment, and overall wellness. Extended follow-up assessments track your progress over time.

Yes. The platform includes a secure chat feature to connect with CAT Kenya support staff. You can also request referrals to partner mental health professionals.

No. All services on the wellness platform are completely free for survivors of torture and human rights violations, funded by CAT Kenya and our partners.

Ready to Begin Your Healing Journey?

Take the first step towards recovery. Access confidential support, track your progress, and connect with caring professionals.
